nasb.text: Yet My eye spared them rather than destroying them, and I did not cause their annihilation in the wilderness.

esv.text: Nevertheless, my eye spared them, and I did not destroy them or make a full end of them in the wilderness.

cnv.text: 雖然這樣，我的眼還是顧惜他們，不毀滅他們；我沒有在曠野把他們滅絕。

ccb.text: 但我怜悯他们，没有毁灭他们，没有在旷野把他们全部灭绝。
